usecase: Slide wall-hosted device to new position along the same wall.
notfor: Off-wall moves — use MOVE_TO_HOST or MOVE_TO_WALL.
precondition: Active document; device is FamilyInstance with Wall host.
postcondition: Zero or one MoveElement inside inner Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolver_DeviceUniqueId required OR single selection.
2) Resolve device; WireError if not FamilyInstance with Wall host.
3) wall = fi.Host as Wall; tangent = wall.LocationCurve tangent direction (projected onto XY).
4) If Resolver_PreferForward=false, flip tangent.
5) Delegate TryDirectionalMoveOnService.ProbeAndMove(doc, fi, tangent, step_ft, threshold_ft, centreFallback=false).
6) Emit outcome + wall_tangent_ft.

preprompts: Sliding wall-hosted device along wall tangent…
